user_query: Play one ViZDoom episode. Watch the video and choose actions that first align the enemy near the center/crosshair, then fire only when aligned.
Play one ViZDoom episode. Use movement to correct aim when the enemy is off-center, and attack only when the target appears centered.
Play one ViZDoom episode. Inspect each short video clip and choose one action that improves alignment or fires when alignment is already good.
